title: NEBNext Ultra II Directional RNA Library Prep Kit for Illumina: Adapter Ligation
author: Opentrons
materials: NEBNext Ultra II Directional RNA Library Prep Kit

steps.title: This protocol adds the necessary reagents...
steps.instruction: This protocol adds the necessary reagents for the adapter ligation in the NEBNext Ultra II Directional RNA Library Prep Kit for Illumina.
2.5 uL of diluted adapter is added to each sample

steps.title: 31 uL of the combined master...
steps.instruction: 31 uL of the combined master mix and ligation enzyme is added to each sample. NOTE: If more than 6 columns (48 samples) are specified, the master mix/ligation enzyme is split evenly between two strips on the temperature deck. The OT-2 will alternate between the two strips as it adds to the plate.

steps.title: The OT-2 flashes and alerts the...
steps.instruction: The OT-2 flashes and alerts the user to move the sample plate to an off-deck thermocycler

steps.title: The sample plate is replaced post-thermocycler...
steps.instruction: The sample plate is replaced post-thermocycler and 3 uL of user enzyme is added to the samples
